args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
explain_json=$(mktemp)
build_json=$(mktemp)
replay_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json > "$explain_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --format json > "$build_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- replay --bundle "$bundle_dir" --format json > "$replay_json"
python3 - "$explain_json" "$build_json" "$replay_json" "$bundle_dir/backend_decision.json" "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
explain = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
build = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
replay = json.load(open(sys.argv[3]))
bundle_backend = json.load(open(sys.argv[4]))
buildplan = json.load(open(sys.argv[5]))
explain_backend = explain['backend_decision']
assert explain_backend == build['backend_decision']
assert explain_backend == replay['backend_decision']
assert explain_backend == bundle_backend
entries = {entry['family']: entry for entry in explain_backend['entries']}
assert entries['FlashInfer']['selected_for_deployment'] is True
assert entries['FlashInfer']['runtime_reachable'] is True
assert entries['Triton']['build_technically_possible'] is True
assert entries['Triton']['runtime_reachable'] is False
assert buildplan['structural_identity']['backend_decision_identity']
assert any(manifest['binary_name'] == 'flashinfer_extension.so' for manifest in explain_backend['extension_manifests'])
PY
printf 'backend-decision\n'
